dashboard.description: This dashboard provides a concise overview of the workloads of all ECS instances in the NonProd environment on Alibaba Cloud, enabling quick identification of ECS instances that have been running with long-term low utilization.

list.description: Supports ECS tag filtering with the prefix format of "o11y.aliyun.dev/", such as "o11y.aliyun.dev/key1:value1".
list.label: TagKey
list.name: tagKey

dashboard.title: AliCloud ECS Overview - NonProd Copy
